loginform-blurb: CropTool2 is a tool for cropping images (JPG, PNG, GIF, SVG, WebP, PDF, TIFF or DjVu files) at Wikimedia sites. Learn more.
loginform-help: To use CropTool2 you need to connect it to your Wikimedia account. This process is secure and your password will not be given to CropTool2.
INVALID_COOKIE: Your session has expired. Please re-authorize.
titleform-help: Enter the URL or filename for an image you would like to crop.
titleform-footer: Tip: You can open CropTool2 directly from a media file. Learn more at Commons.
file-waiting-for-license-review: This file is waiting for license review. Please wait until the review has been completed before cropping it.
fetching-progress: Please wait while fetching image data and metadata... This might take some time depending on the image size...
cropform-method-precise-help: Uses your exact selection, but may cause a small loss of JPEG quality.
cropform-method-lossless-help: Avoids JPEG quality loss, but may include a few extra pixels at the top or left.
previewform-lossless-explanation: Lossless mode may include a few extra pixels.
previewform-overwrite-policy: Consult COM:CROP before overwriting.
previewform-overwrite-policy-help: Overwrite only minor improvements. Upload substantial or contested changes as a new file.
previewform-assessment-template: The overwrite option is disabled because the image has passed an assessment process.
previewform-donotcrop-template: The overwrite option is disabled because the file has been tagged with the 'do not crop' or 'border is intentional' template. Only proceed uploading a new file if you are sure that a cropped version is needed.
previewform-upload-protected: The overwrite option is disabled because the original file is protected against uploading new versions.
previewform-multipage-file: The overwrite option is disabled because this is a multipage file.
previewform-removed-border-help: Confirms removal of the 'remove border' template
previewform-wikidata-crop: Add image to Wikidata as an illustration of {{link}}
previewform-wikidata-crop-help: Add the cropped image as an illustration (P18) of the Wikidata data element.
previewform-new-title-exists-overwrite-w: Consult COM:CROP before overwriting.
results-success-details: You can now review the result (Refresh the page if you see the uncropped image). If you've made a substantial crop, you might need to update the description, templates and/or categories.
results-success-wikidata: The image was added to {{link}}. You might want to review the item.
